pi_items.verified_value: Morrison & Foerster LLP (real law firm headquartered in San Francisco)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves a paralegal (O*NET-SOC 23-2011.00) working in legal services finalizing a patent license agreement document. Morrison & Foerster LLP is a real multinational law firm headquartered in San Francisco with over 1,000 lawyers. The document itself (patent_license_draft_tracked.docx) is synthetic, featuring a patent license agreement between fictional companies BioSynthetics Corporation and MedTech Innovations LLC, containing tracked changes from attorneys J. Morrison and R. Chen. The document includes the required text phrases 'non-exclusive and sublicensable' and 'thirty (30) days' but initially contains no footnotes.
